overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle flying over vast desert canyons during a dramatic sunset-to-night transition. The bird glides through warm golden lighting that gradually shifts to deep purple dusk and finally to a starry night sky, showcasing the expansive rocky terrain below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon during golden hour

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding steadily over the canyon with wings fully extended, maintaining consistent altitude while surveying the terrain below

entered.detail: vast canyon system with layered red rock formations illuminated by warm golden sunset light
flat-topped rock formation rising prominently from the desert floor
hazy purple mountain silhouettes stretching across the horizon

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars over a vast desert canyon bathed in golden hour light. Red rock formations and distant mesas stretch across the landscape, illuminated by the warm sunset glow. The bird maintains a steady glide with wings spread wide, surveying the expansive terrain below.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon ridge at dusk with gathering clouds

events.description: sun sets below horizon, lighting shifts from golden hour to purple dusk tones

agents.ego_description: eagle banking gently to the right while continuing to glide, following the curve of the canyon ridge as the landscape darkens

entered.detail: dark storm clouds gathering on the horizon, illuminated from below by the last light of sunset

segments.scene_description: As dusk settles, the canyon transitions from golden warmth to deep purple shadows. Dark clouds gather on the horizon while the eagle banks right, following the ridge line. The rock formations become silhouetted against the fading light, and the distant mesa passes out of view behind the bird.

scene_state.functional_zone: night sky above desert canyon with visible stars

events.description: sky darkens to deep blue and then black, stars become visible across the night sky

agents.ego_description: eagle climbing higher into the night sky, wings catching the last ambient light as the landscape falls away into darkness below

entered.detail: scattered stars becoming visible in the darkening sky, transitioning to a clear starry night

segments.scene_description: The eagle ascends into the night as the sky transforms to deep purple and then black, revealing a field of stars. The canyon below becomes a dark silhouette, and the clouds that were on the horizon now drift through the center of the frame. The bird climbs higher, becoming a dark shape against the starry sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an eagle glides over a vast desert canyon that transforms from a golden sunset into a starry night. It begins with the bird soaring over red rock formations and distant mesas bathed in a warm, golden hour glow. As dusk settles, the lighting shifts from golden warmth to deep purple shadows, and the camera banks right along a ridge line while the landscape becomes silhouetted against gathering clouds. The scene then ascends further into the atmosphere as the sky deepens to black, revealing a field of stars and drifting clouds. Finally, the eagle climbs higher, becoming a dark silhouette against the celestial expanse as the canyon below fades into a dark void.
